name: han
description: Han's skill set: self-learning skill factory + image generation suite (han-imagen engine, infographic, hand-write-pic, disassembly-diagram, slides, svg) + llm-wiki (personal knowledge-base wiki with 9 commands) + kernel-crash-analyzer-v2 (Linux kernel crash analysis for Qualcomm/Android) + d2-diagram (D2 declarative diagrams) + git-commit (interactive git commit message generator) + flash-test (UFS/eMMC read/write benchmark).

interface.shortDescription: Personal skill factory and image-generation workflows
interface.longDescription: Han's Codex skill collection. Ships skill-creator-plus (self-learning skill factory), han-imagen (image generation engine, OpenAI/Google), han-infographic / han-hand-write-pic / han-disassembly-diagram (infographic, sketchnote, teardown with anti-hallucination two-phase flow + self-learning), han-slides (image slide deck → PPTX/PDF), han-svg (editable SVG diagrams), and llm-wiki (personal knowledge-base wiki with 9 commands: init/ingest/query/lint/card/weekly/research/mode/think/save). Includes kernel-crash-analyzer-v2 (Linux kernel crash analysis — NULL pointer / KASAN UAF / SLUB / deadlock — with disassembly-first workflow + self-learning). Also ships d2-diagram (D2 declarative diagrams), git-commit (interactive git commit message generator), and flash-test (UFS/eMMC read/write benchmark).
defaultPrompt: Create a self-learning skill with a feedback loop
Split a bloated SKILL.md into on-demand files
Add self-learning to an existing skill
Generate an infographic from an article
Draw / generate an image (OpenAI or Google)
Draw a hand-drawn sketchnote knowledge card
Maintain a personal knowledge wiki (ingest / query / lint / card / weekly)
Analyze a Linux kernel crash dump (NULL pointer / KASAN / SLUB / deadlock) on Qualcomm/Android
Draw a D2 declarative diagram (flowchart / architecture / ER / class)
Generate a structured git commit message from a diff
Benchmark UFS/eMMC read/write throughput on an Android device
